chunks.text: THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Present: Mr. Justice Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry & Mr. Justice Abdul Mobeen Lakho. Const. Petition No. D – 5409 of 2024 [Jawad Ali v. Province of Sindh and others] Petitioner: Jawad Ali son of Khuda Bakhsh Larik through Mr. Yasir Hussain, Advocate. Date of hearing: 28-10-2024 Date of order: 28-10-2024 O R D E R Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry J. – 1] Urgency granted. 2] Office objection No.32 is over-ruled inasmuch as the petition does not assail the order of the Deputy Commissioner Dadu, but assails a charge sheet issued to the Petitioner by the Chief Secretary at Karachi. 3] Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 4-5] With the allegation that whilst performing functions as Additional Deputy Commissioner-I Dadu, the Petitioner had issued illegal orders, the Petitioner was issued a charge sheet on 04-10-2024 pursuant to the Sindh Civil Servant (Efficiency & Discipline) Rules, 1973. He was called upon to file a written reply against the charge sheet. Counsel submits that the Petitioner was not provided any documents in support of the charge sheet. However, the request made by the Petitioner for providing document(s) is dated 21-10-2024 i.e. after the period provided for submitting a reply had lapsed. There is apparently no reply by the Petitioner to the charge sheet. Therefore, we see no reason to interfere in such proceedings. Petition is dismissed in limine. JUDGE JUDGE SHABAN*
